hero.headline: Senior Implementation Lead who delivers enterprise outcomes at scale
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts with full account-level ownership — kickoff through structured hypercare. 5+ years translating complex requirements into scalable configurations across regulated and process-heavy industries. Expert at workflow design, stakeholder alignment, and mentoring implementation teams.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Owned 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations at the account level — full lifecycle responsibility from kickoff through structured hypercare and Customer Success handoff.

Led workflow and solution design across complex multi-module configurations — translating enterprise requirements into scalable SaaS implementations for facility management and manufacturing operations.

Managed account-level customer delivery and communication — facilitated steering meetings with senior stakeholders, aligned expectations, and handled escalations across UK, US, and Middle East engagements.
Mentored implementation team members through structured coaching on workflow design, delivery standards, and customer communication — building scalable practices across the implementation function.

highlights.label: Account-level ownership
highlights.text: Delivered complex enterprise implementations independently — managed multi-stakeholder delivery, risk mitigation, and go-live execution without senior hand-holding. Built structured hypercare processes and clean handoff documentation for Customer Success teams.

highlights.label: Workflow & solution design
highlights.text: Conceptualized a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort models — enabling scalable delivery practices and accurate scoping across the implementation team.

highlights.label: Enterprise delivery excellence
highlights.text: Travelled on-site for high-stakes implementations including Saudi Arabia ($500K engagement) and UK — delivered structured workshops, stakeholder alignment, and go-live training across regulated facility operations.

highlights.label: Implementation scalability
highlights.text: Built playbooks, templates, and checklists used across the implementation function — identified scope-change tracking mechanisms and collaborated with Sales to introduce billable Professional Services frameworks.

highlights.label: Complex requirements translation
highlights.text: Scoped and delivered integrations across SSO (SAML/SCIM) and enterprise platforms including Xero, CorrigoPro, Bill.com, and SFG20 — validated API feasibility and authored integration requirement documents for engineering teams.

highlights.label: Customer Success handoffs
highlights.text: 4 of 5 pilot implementations converted to full enterprise rollouts — through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and comprehensive account documentation enabling smooth post-go-live adoption.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Owned complex operational process implementations across Amazon Fresh, Pantry, and Prime Now — delivering measurable efficiency improvements through systematic workflow design.
Designed and implemented a defect prioritisation framework using forecasting data and business metrics — delivered $230K in monthly operational savings through structured process improvement.
Coordinated cross-functional execution to resolve process gaps — reduced invalid case assignments between teams by ~50 per day through SOP standardisation and workflow optimization.

customSections.title: Industry & Domain Expertise
items: Facility Management & CMMS — 20 enterprise implementations across regulated operations
Manufacturing Operations — complex multi-module configurations for process-heavy environments
Enterprise Integration — SSO, third-party platforms, API validation and requirement documentation
Global Enterprise Delivery — UK, US, Middle East on-site and remote implementation experience
